calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-11-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-19-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Constance Tomal and Steven McDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lee Eunice Lowrey, also present.
Defendant, Larry Darnell Chew present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement, terms read in to the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 2051 Carroll Ave., Lower Unit, San Francisco.
Plaintiff waives back rent and per diem damages, Writ issue forthwith on Jan. 15, 2004, Stayed of execution until Feb. 6, 2004. Each side to bear its own costs and attorney's fees.
Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture, any items left in the premises after Feb. 6, 2004 will be disposed of.
Each party waives claim against the other.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
Plaintiff's counsel to prepare judgment.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2003 Text Ruling
